summary: Regression after code-review fixes (seed_data() helpers split, httpOnly cookie on login, SessionContext demo-users bootstrap, stable React keys, demo-login-onboarding-btn). Backend: 33/33 pytest pass (29 prior + 4 new cookie regression tests). Frontend (480x900): all 5 demo buttons present with unique testids, Admin login + role-switcher hop Admin->Employee->HR->Manager->Admin works, correct user (Sarah/Priya/Michael/Admin) lands per switch, bottom nav swaps to Home/Attendance/Performance/Training/Contributions for employee. Module sanity all green: attendance clock-in/out, leave new request form (new-leave-btn), payroll payslip detail (Earnings/Deductions render), Copilot panel opened via open-copilot-btn returned Claude Sonnet 4.5 multi-paragraph leave answer.

issues: Next.js webpack-hmr WebSocket still returns 502 in preview env — non-blocking noise; expected for ingress without WS pass-through.

critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is still ~1132 lines despite the seed refactor — non-blocking, but consider splitting per-module routers for maintainability (>700 line threshold).
JWT secret + CORS_ORIGINS='*' in /app/backend/.env are acceptable for preview but must be hardened pre-production.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_cookie.py (new — 4 cookie regression tests covering login Set-Cookie, /me cookie-only, /me bearer-only, logout cookie-clear)
test_credentials: Loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — all 5 demo accounts (admin/sarah/michael/priya/alex) authenticate successfully.
seed_data_creation: Tests reuse existing TEST_-prefixed records from iteration_1 and add new TEST_pytest leave/expense/recognition/announcement records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code-review fixes verified: (a) Set-Cookie present with HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=lax on login; (b) /api/auth/me works with cookie-only AND bearer-only; (c) logout clears cookie via Max-Age=0; (d) Alex now has unique demo-login-onboarding-btn (duplicate testid bug from iteration_1 is fixed); (e) Role switcher fetches creds from /api/auth/demo-users (no hardcoded creds) — flow exercised live and works. Backend public URL: https://hr-system-build-3.preview.emergentagent.com. Note: leave/copilot selectors are 'new-leave-btn' (NOT 'new-leave-request-btn') and copilot is opened via 'open-copilot-btn' floating action (no /copilot route).
rca of the issue: No regressions found. Previous iteration's duplicate-testid issue is resolved — Alex's demo button now uses demo-login-onboarding-btn and is uniquely targetable.
